title: Create Vendor + Pay Vendor
description: Same user can create a vendor master record and release payments to it.

title: Post Goods Receipt + Post Invoice
description: Same user can confirm goods received and post the matching invoice.

title: Create Customer + Release Credit
description: Same user can create a customer master and release their credit block.

title: Maintain HR Master + Run Payroll
description: Same user can edit employee bank data and trigger payroll run.

title: Create User + Assign SAP_ALL
description: Same user can create SAP users and assign the SAP_ALL profile.
